title: A2A Promote Pipeline
entry_point: main() in scripts/a2a_promote.js, invoked via: node scripts/a2a_promote.js --type <capsule|gene|event> --id <id> [--validated]
activities: parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2)) → extract id, type, validated flag, limit (default 500)
[Guard] id and typeRaw present? → No → throw Error('Usage...')
[Guard] validated flag set? → No → throw Error('Refusing to promote without --validated')
Normalise type: capsule→Capsule, gene→Gene, event→EvolutionEvent; invalid → throw Error
[Guard] candidate with matching type+id found? → No → throw Error('Candidate not found in external zone')
[Branch] type === 'Gene'? → Yes → validate each validation command via solidifyMod.isValidationCommandAllowed(c); rejected command → throw Error('validation command rejected by safety check')
[If emitDecisions] a2aProto.buildDecision({decision:'accept', reason:'event promoted for provenance tracking'}) → a2aProto.getTransport().send(dm)
[If emitDecisions] a2aProto.buildDecision({decision:'accept', reason:'capsule promoted after validation'}) → a2aProto.getTransport().send(dm)
assetStore.loadGenes() → check for existing local gene with same id
→ Yes: [If emitDecisions] a2aProto.buildDecision({decision:'reject', reason:'local gene with same ID already exists'}) → send
[If emitDecisions] a2aProto.buildDecision({decision:'accept', reason:'gene promoted after safety audit'}) → send
Top-level catch: stderr error message → process.exit(1)

branches.condition: candidate not found in external zone
type === Gene AND validation command disallowed

branches.true_path: appendEventJsonl → optionally send A2A decision → stdout promoted_event → return
appendCapsule → optionally send A2A decision → stdout promoted_capsule → return

branches.condition: local Gene with same id exists
branches.false_path: upsertGene → accept decision → stdout promoted_gene → return

branches.true_path: build + send A2A decision message (errors silently swallowed)

key_modules: assetStore: readRecentExternalCandidates(limit), appendEventJsonl(obj), appendCapsule(obj), loadGenes(), upsertGene(obj)
solidifyMod: isValidationCommandAllowed(cmd) — safety allowlist check (node/npm/npx, no shell operators)
contentHash: SCHEMA_VERSION constant, computeAssetId(obj) — deterministic ID from content hash
a2aProto: buildDecision({assetId, localId, decision, reason}), getTransport().send(msg) — A2A protocol messaging
promotion_outcomes: promoted_event=<id>  — EvolutionEvent written to event JSONL
promoted_capsule=<id> — Capsule appended to capsule store
promoted_gene=<id>   — Gene upserted into gene store
conflict_keep_local_gene=<id> — Gene promotion rejected; local copy retained
important_notes: Pre-condition: caller must run local verification and pass --validated flag explicitly. Gene path includes extra safety audit of validation commands (allowlist via solidifyMod). A2A decision messages are best-effort (exceptions silently caught). All errors exit(1) via top-level try/catch.
